headline: Humana Closes the Kindred Chapter With $900 Million Gentiva Exit
summary: HUM is cashing out its Gentiva stake for $900 million, completing a multiyear effort to sharpen focus on its core health insurance business.

raw.headline: Humana Closes the Kindred Chapter With $900 Million Gentiva Exit
raw.summary: HUM is cashing out its Gentiva stake for $900 million, completing a multiyear effort to sharpen focus on its core health insurance business.

headline: Humana divests interest in end-of-life provider Gentiva valued at $900M
summary: The insurer is offloading its interest in the massive end-of-life care provider to an undisclosed group of investors, amid widespread concern about private investors’ activity in healthcare.

raw.headline: Humana divests interest in end-of-life provider Gentiva valued at $900M
raw.summary: The insurer is offloading its interest in the massive end-of-life care provider to an undisclosed group of investors, amid widespread concern about private investors’ activity in healthcare.

headline: Patients Denied Care, Then Approved Later? Federal Watchdog Raises Medicare Advantage Concerns
summary: Federal investigators found Medicare Advantage plans frequently denied requests for nursing and rehabilitation care, with many decisions later overturned on appeal.

raw.headline: Patients Denied Care, Then Approved Later? Federal Watchdog Raises Medicare Advantage Concerns
raw.summary: Federal investigators found Medicare Advantage plans frequently denied requests for nursing and rehabilitation care, with many decisions later overturned on appeal.
